name: Deployment Pipeline Test
description: A scoped-down test blueprint to verify the venture deployment pipeline without open-ended ideation.

invariants.condition: CREATE DUMMY VENTURE: Create a simple 'Timestamp Service' venture blueprint. The blueprint should just have one invariant: 'Output current timestamp'. Do NOT perform any research or validation. Just create the artifact.
invariants.assessment: Verify a simple blueprint.json artifact is created with minimal content (one invariant about outputting timestamp).

invariants.condition: TEST EXECUTION BEFORE DEPLOYMENT: FOR EACH venture package created, dispatch it as a child workstream using dispatch_new_job with sample inputs. The child job will execute the venture blueprint to validate it works. Re-invocation occurs automatically when all children complete.
invariants.assessment: Verify dispatch_new_job was called with the created venture blueprint and that the system was re-invoked after child completion.

invariants.condition: TEMPLATE REGISTRATION (AFTER RE-INVOCATION): When re-invoked with completed test children, register the venture as a template using register_template. Use priceWei='100000000000000' (0.0001 ETH) and status='hidden'.
invariants.assessment: Verify register_template was called after re-invocation with priceWei='100000000000000' and status='hidden'.
